items.key: (ma_dvcs in (select ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1) or @@admin = 1)

(exists(select 1 from dmdcct a where a.ma_bp_dc = dmbpcc.ma_bp and a.ma_dc = '{$%c[ma_dc]}') or exists(select 1 from ctpsdc b where b.ma_bp_dc = dmbpcc.ma_bp and b.ma_dc = '{$%c[ma_dc]}')) and status = '1'
items.check: exists(select 1 from dmdcct a where a.ma_bp_dc = dmbpcc.ma_bp and a.ma_dc = '{$%c[ma_dc]}') or exists(select 1 from ctpsdc b where b.ma_bp_dc = dmbpcc.ma_bp and b.ma_dc = '{$%c[ma_dc]}')

footer.v: 1 - Theo giá trị phân bổ kỳ, 2 - Theo giá trị còn lại
footer.e: 1 - By Allocation per Period, 2 - By Remaining Value

command.text:
&CommandToolSupplyLockedBeforeEdit;
declare @message nvarchar(4000), @baseCurrency varchar(32) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @message = 'this._baseCurrency=''' + @baseCurrency + ''';initFormDisposal(this);loadingFormDisposal(this);' &CommandWhenToolSupplyExternalBeforeEdit; select @message as message return

&CommandToolSupplyLockedBeforeEdit;
declare @message nvarchar(4000), @baseCurrency varchar(32) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @message = 'this._baseCurrency=''' + @baseCurrency + ''';initFormDisposal(this);' &CommandWhenToolSupplyExternalBeforeEdit; select @message as message return

declare @c char(32), @d smalldatetime, @p char(32) select @c = ma_dc, @d = ngay_ct, @p = ma_bp_dc from gpbdc where stt_rec = @stt_rec
create table #ts(ma_dvcs varchar(32), nguyen_gia_nt1 numeric(19,2), nguyen_gia1 numeric(19,2), gt_pb_nt1 numeric(19,2), gt_pb1 numeric(19,2), ma_nt char(3), ten_nt nvarchar(128), nguyen_gia_nt0 numeric(19,2), nguyen_gia0 numeric(19,2), gt_pb_nt0 numeric(19,2), gt_pb0 numeric(19,2), gt_cl_nt numeric(19,2), gt_cl numeric(19,2), so_luong numeric(19,3)) insert into #ts exec rs_CheckTSDecrease @d, @c, @p, @@language, @stt_rec
select cast(case when a.ma_dvcs = @@unit then 1 else 0 end as bit) as dv_yn, b.ten_bp%l, c.nguyen_gia_nt1, c.nguyen_gia1, c.gt_pb_nt1, c.gt_pb1, c.nguyen_gia_nt0, c.nguyen_gia0, c.gt_pb_nt0, c.gt_pb0 from &ToolSupplyTable; a join dmbpcc b on a.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp cross join #ts c where a.&ToolSupplyField; = @&ToolSupplyField; return

declare @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$invalidQuantity nvarchar(512), @$xvalue int select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$invalidQuantity = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số lượng giảm không hợp lệ.' else N'You have entered an invalid quantity input.' end

&CommandCheckLockedDate; &CheckData;
if not exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select 'ngay_ct' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end select @so_ct = space(datalength(@so_ct) - len(rtrim(@so_ct))) + rtrim(@so_ct)

update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_dc = @ma_dc and ngay_ct = @ngay_ct
&Post;

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmccdc where ma_dc = @ma_dc) begin exec rs_CheckTSDecrease @ngay_ct, @ma_dc, @ma_bp_dc, @@language, @stt_rec return end
